blockerNotes: The one-deal foundation is merged. VP-3.46 must prove tenant isolation in a real ephemeral PostgreSQL 16 job before gateway consolidation, persistent identity or production RLS rollout proceeds.

industrialOneDealFoundation.layer: Canonical PostgreSQL deal command path and shared role workspace
requiredInvariants: one deal identity and one factual state for all roles
trusted transaction-local RLS for canonical reads and writes
strict command idempotency inside the trusted transaction
no human confirmation of bank reserve or release
no synthetic successful backend or bank reference
server-derived tenant organization role and actor
legacy controller role allowlists remain intact
test seed is explicit idempotent and production-denied by default

vp346PostgresRlsIntegration.layer: VP-3.46 Ephemeral PostgreSQL RLS Integration Harness
requiredEvidence: all eight protected tables have ENABLE and FORCE RLS
tenant A cannot read tenant B deal audit outbox snapshot or attempt
missing any trusted context field denies access
transaction-local context is cleared after commit
API Tests workflow uploads the dedicated RLS integration artifact

nextAfterCurrentGreen: #2267 canonical gateway consolidation inside one trusted RLS transaction
persistent identity session refresh-family revoke MFA and tenant source of truth
durable outbox worker and bank reconciliation
load restore DR accessibility and operational acceptance
readiness: 85% honest architectural readiness. The one-deal foundation is merged, while VP-3.46 proves PostgreSQL tenant isolation only in ephemeral CI. It does not apply production RLS or migrations, complete persistent identity, activate live bank, FGIS or EDO integrations, or prove load, restore or disaster recovery.
